scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @prima-wash/contracts && npm run build --workspace @prima-wash/api && npm run build --workspace @prima-wash/web
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @prima-wash/contracts && npm run build --workspace @prima-wash/contracts && npm run check --workspace @prima-wash/api && npm run check --workspace @prima-wash/web && npm run check --workspace @prima-wash/mobile
